name: conform-has-install-script
description: Drop-in PM conformance fixture for npm's per-package verbatim lockfile keys. esbuild carries hasInstallScript in package-lock.json (its postinstall selects the prebuilt platform binary). Direction A is the field-preservation test: real npm writes hasInstallScript, nub frozen-reads and re-emits it with zero churn. Direction B confirms npm ci accepts a nub-written lockfile unchanged.
